title: Bana Besadii Diori
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Bana}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Bana Besadii Diori |homeworld=[[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] *[[Hutt underground|Hutt resistance]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Han Solo, meet Bana. He's here on behalf of the Hutt resistance.''"
"''And an investor in this … place. Despite which I've been ill treated. Kept in close quarters for the journey. Very inhospitable.|Lando Calrissian and Bana Besadii Diori|''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''}} '''Bana Besadii Diori''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] clan. He was a member of the [[Hutt underground|Hutt resistance]], and helped supply some funds for [[Shelter]] after meeting with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. He initially asked if the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] would fight alongside the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], but eventually settled for the use the [[Great River]] to run weapons and supplies for the resistance. He was a cousin of [[Randa Besadii Diori]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Bana Besadii Diori#legends |es=Bana Besadii Diori }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Besadii Diori, Bana}} [[Category:Besadii kajidic]] [[Category:Hutts]] [[Category:Males]]
